action: Reconcile accepted additive continuity records with canonical queue state through a deterministic, reviewable, non-mutating projection.

completed_slice.verification: 3 Node tests passed locally for the new runner; the workflow also runs the original reconciler tests and enforces fail-closed adoption assertions before artifact upload.
completed_slice.finding: A continuity projection is reviewable only when its canonical input, additive update paths, exact source commit, and no-adoption boundary are preserved together.

acceptance_test: The workflow tests both continuity modules, emits one projection bound to GITHUB_SHA, uploads it under a commit-specific artifact name, and fails if automatic adoption or canonical mutation is permitted.
privacy_boundary: Public repository files, commit metadata, abstract coordination state, paths, and deterministic digests only; raw private chat, health material, credentials, identifying personal data, and unreviewed uploads remain excluded.
next_action: Obtain and retain a successful workflow artifact, verify its commit and projection digest, then design a separate explicit authorization record for canonical adoption without allowing the workflow itself to mutate ACTIVE_QUEUE.json.
